title: funastrum bicolor
intro: Funastrum bicolor, also known as Yellow Milkvine, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Funastrum bicolor can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including tea, infusion, and tincture.
